headline: Swan Bitcoin Faces $1B Lawsuit Over Pre-Bankruptcy Transfers

article.title: Swan Bitcoin sued for nearly $1B over pre-bankruptcy transfers from Prime Trust
article.summary: Swan Bitcoin has been sued for allegedly using insider access to pull nearly $1 billion in Bitcoin and cash from Prime Trust days before its 2023 bankruptcy filing.

headline: House Vote Nears on CBDC Ban Bill Today

headline: Oil Prices Dip 2% on Eased Iran Tensions

article.title: Trump Says He Held Off Attacking Iran After Gulf Appeal
article.summary: US President Donald Trump said he called off a new bombardment of Iran planned for Tuesday after Persian Gulf allies wanted more time to pursue diplomacy. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: Goldman Sachs Sees $10B Iran Trade Opportunity

article.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s international co-heads say the turbulent start to the year has done little to deter clients, underscoring Wall Street’s bullish outlook despite events like the Iran war.
